texto: My message for all my readers is: Don't believe in those who claim that youth is a passing disease you just have to get rid of. Don't believe, that maturity is a goal and an asset to go after. Nothing will ever be ready, that is what makes life interesting. Read!
explicacao: Orientação direta de Tuula Kallioniemi sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “My message for all my readers is: Don't believe in those who claim that youth is a passing diseas…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a vida, mature, read, útil em momentos de mature e read.
